$description: TEMPLATE design-tokens.tokens.json — W3C Design Tokens (DTCG) Format Module 2025.10. A token is an object with required $value plus $type; alias syntax "{group.token}". The spec recommends file extensions .tokens / .tokens.json and the MIME type application/design-tokens+json. JSON has no comments, so ALL template guidance lives in $description strings and $extensions['agent.guidance'] objects: follow them, then rewrite each $description to document the project (never ship template instructions). Example values are the verified sample palette/scale from 05-color.md and 06-spacing.md — replace them with project values, keep the structure. Tiers: primitive (raw values) -> semantic (aliases primitives) -> component (aliases semantics); a raw value above the primitive tier is a defect. Themes: this file holds primitives + LIGHT semantic aliases + component aliases; emit design-tokens.dark.tokens.json re-targeting ONLY the semantic tier (identical token names, different alias targets). Validate: python3 -m json.tool design-tokens.tokens.json

agent.guidance.schema: 10-modes-and-artifacts.md section 3 — DTCG 2025.10 rules, top-level group list, semver mapping, REQUIRED root agent.meta block
fillOrder: 0. agent.meta: REQUIRED root block (10-modes-and-artifacts.md section 3) — version is semver (create/recreate emit 1.0.0; modify bumps per the section-3 table); generated = ISO date of emission; the confidence map (8 dimensions, spec section 11) is recreate-only — DELETE it in create/modify
1. color primitives: build 11-step ramps (50-950) on the L anchors in 05-color.md; author in oklch, always emit the computed sRGB hex fallback; every 50-950 step must be sRGB-in-gamut
2. color semantics: alias primitives per the semantic map in 05-color.md; run the contrast gate (05-color.md Code Examples) on every pair, both themes, before sign-off

3. space: adopt the canonical scale verbatim (n = px / 4); fluid endpoints + viewportRange go in $extensions['agent.fluid'], the build step composes clamp() — clamp() strings are NOT representable as dimension $value

4. type + typography: fill the type.step.N primitives from the 04-typography.md fluid scale ($value = clamp max; min + viewportRange in $extensions['agent.fluid']), then the typography.* composites — their fontSize MUST alias {type.step.N} (10-modes-and-artifacts.md section 3); fluid clamp() is composed at build from the step metadata

5. motion: keep durations inside the four canonical classes (07-animation-choreography.md) and the personality slices (01-visual-motion.md); cubicBezier values come from the canonical easing table only
6. component tier: aliases of semantics only; one token per themable part
7. delete this agent.guidance block and all template-instruction $description text when done
agent.guidance.naming: dot-paths via nesting; segments kebab-case; ramp steps are numeric strings; names must not contain . { } or start with $ (_conventions.md section 3.7)
agent.guidance.cssTransform: token path -> custom property: prefix -- and replace dots with hyphens, e.g. color.bg.primary -> --color-bg-primary (binding, 05/06)

color.$description: Rename 'blue' to the project brand hue name. Template shows 3 of the 11 ramp steps — fill 50-950 per 05-color.md L anchors. $type is set explicitly on every color token (no group inheritance), per 05-color.md.

400.$description: EXAMPLE step — dark-theme CTA fill in the sample system. Replace components + hex together (hex = computed sRGB fallback, never source of truth).

500.$description: EXAMPLE brand anchor (L 0.58). Keep chroma <= 0.9x the sRGB gamut max at this L/H.

600.$description: EXAMPLE step — light-theme CTA fill in the sample system.

vivid.$description: OPTIONAL P3-only accent: may exceed sRGB gamut, MUST keep an sRGB-safe hex fallback and ship via the @media (color-gamut: p3) chroma-only override (05-color.md). Delete if unused.

0.$description: Pure white — step 0 exists only on the neutral ramp.

50.$description: EXAMPLE — neutrals carry a hue tint toward the brand hue (C 0.003-0.015) for cohesion.

950.$description: EXAMPLE — dark-theme page background. Never pure #000 (halation; 05-color.md Anti-Patterns).

bg.$description: SEMANTIC tier — light-theme aliases only in this file; dark re-targets in design-tokens.dark.tokens.json. Complete the set per the 05-color.md semantic map (bg.secondary, bg.elevated, bg.brand-hover, ...).

focus.$description: Focus ring — must verify >= 3:1 against every background it appears on.

space.$description: Canonical scale (owner: 06-spacing.md; pinned in _conventions.md section 3.5). n = px / 4; base 8px with 4px half-steps below 16. Adopt verbatim; extend only with integer n. $value is an object {value, unit}; units px|rem only; unit required even at 0.

rhythm.$description: 1 rhythm unit = body line box (16px x 1.5 = 24px). Recompute if the body size changes (06-spacing.md Mode-Specific Guidance).

gutter.$description: Fluid 16->32px. Endpoints are tokens; the build composes clamp() from $extensions — clamp() is not a valid dimension $value.

family.$description: Replace with project faces (licenses recorded in design-system-spec.md section 2). Array = stack with fallbacks.

type.$description: PRIMITIVE fluid type scale (owner: 04-typography.md section 4.2; emitted as --step-N custom properties). Template shows steps 0 and 6 — fill 0-6 per the project ratio. $value = the clamp() MAX (px at the wide anchor); fluid min + viewport range live in $extensions['agent.fluid'] and the build composes clamp() (clamp() strings are NOT representable as dimension $value). typography.* composites alias these steps — never restate sizes there (10-modes-and-artifacts.md section 3).

0.$description: EXAMPLE body step, doc-04 reference scale (16->18px at 320->1280). min is the 16px body floor (_conventions.md section 3.6) — never lower.

6.$description: EXAMPLE display step, doc-04 reference scale (48->69px at 320->1280); max/min per step <= 2.5x (04-typography.md).

typography.$description: COMPOSITE role tokens ($type typography), e.g. typography.display/h1/h2/body. Sub-values: fontFamily, fontSize (MUST alias a {type.step.N} primitive — contract: 10-modes-and-artifacts.md section 3), fontWeight, letterSpacing, lineHeight (unitless multiplier). letterSpacing/tracking is a STATIC per-role value carrying the em amount as a DTCG number token (apply as letter-spacing: <n>em; em scales with each role's font-size natively, so it is correct at every viewport — no per-breakpoint recompute, no build step). em bands per role: 04-typography.md section 4.3.

display.$description: Hero display role. fontSize aliases the type.step primitive (fluid metadata lives on the step, recipes: 04-typography.md). letterSpacing aliases the static tracking.display number token (em); doc-04 display band is -0.02 to -0.03em.

body.$description: Body role. Floor is 16px (_conventions.md section 3.6), enforced by the type.step.0 fluid min. letterSpacing aliases tracking.body (0em). lineHeight stays unitless (04/06: no fixed-px line-height).

tracking.$description: Per-role tracking, STATIC, owned by 04-typography.md section 4.3. Each $value is the em amount — apply as letter-spacing: <n>em. em scales with each role's font-size natively, so the stored value is honest at EVERY viewport; there is no build-time recompute and no fluid range. (DTCG number token: unitless scalar; the em unit is fixed by this convention and stated here.) Fill one token per typography.* role; bands: display -0.02 to -0.03, headline -0.01 to -0.02, subhead 0 to -0.01, body 0, caption +0.01, all-caps +0.05 to +0.10, button 0 to +0.02.

display.$description: Tracking in em — apply as letter-spacing: -0.02em (em scales with font-size, so it is correct at every viewport). Display band -0.02 to -0.03em (04-typography.md section 4.3).

body.$description: Tracking in em — apply as letter-spacing: 0em. Body tracking is 0 (04-typography.md section 4.3).

motion.$description: Durations must sit inside the four canonical classes (07-animation-choreography.md) AND the personality slice matrix (01-visual-motion.md). Example values = the 'fluid' personality slices; re-slice for snappy/cinematic.

ui.$description: UI transition class 200-400ms; nothing UI-blocking may exceed 400ms.

hero.$description: hero/cinematic class 600-1200ms; >1200ms must be skippable or scrub-driven.

ease.$description: CSS approximations of the pinned GSAP eases — values ONLY from the canonical table in 07-animation-choreography.md (GSAP names stay canonical in JS via CustomEase).

out.$description: power3.out — fluid primary entrance ease. Swap per personality (snappy: expo.out [0.19, 1, 0.22, 1]).

button.$description: COMPONENT tier — aliases of semantics only (raw values here are a defect).

bg.$description: Re-point to {color.bg.elevated} once the full semantic set is filled in.
